template: per-head K vs V direction perturbation — Qwen3-4B-Base

parameters.perturbation_scope: per-head (1 of 8 KV heads at ALL positions and ALL layers)

prediction_outcome: Scenario B+C hybrid (30% + 20% pre-registered = 50%): answer heads exist WITH high redundancy
key_finding: Answer heads discovered: H5=50% acc (primary), H0=67% (secondary), 6 others=100% (dispensable). V-immunity absolute (192/192). Head-level redundancy massive: 12.5% per-head K → 89% acc vs 5% per-position K → 14% acc. K-routing fragility is about breadth (all heads at a position) not depth (one head everywhere).
evidence_impact: Major new finding: first per-head analysis reveals answer-routing specialization and resolves the K-routing fragility mechanism. Challenges simple 'K-routing is fragile' narrative with nuanced 'fragile at positions, redundant across heads'. Strongest V-immunity result (192/192).
next_planned: Per-head sweep on Llama for cross-model comparison OR head 5 × position interaction

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. Positional dissociation confirmed. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION discovered (H5, H0).

positional_dissociation.status: Dose-saturated: 5% dose STILL saturates Llama accuracy. Text gradient dose-independent. Encoding-dependent at 5%.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL. Now confirmed at per-head level: V=100% at ALL 8 heads. K > V at 3/8 heads (H0, H5, H7).

head_level_analysis.status: NEW: Answer heads discovered (H5=50%, H0=67%). Head-level redundancy massive. Single-model so far.

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. TC best protection metric.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for positional/component: 4 families, 5 variants. Per-head analysis on 1 model only.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY + encoding-independence at 10% dose + V-immunity dose-dependence confirmed.
